name: @aristotle/mesh-runtime
description: Multi-process governance mesh: root-authority, witness, and edge-gate roles communicating over HTTP. Implements authority-envelope propagation, revocation gossip, Fluidity Tokens, disconnected commit gate, and partition reconciliation.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/index.test.ts src/quorum-routing.test.ts src/ed25519-mesh.test.ts src/ingress-hardening.test.ts src/revocation-quorum.test.ts
